subcodes.first_line: O thou who art ardent for the face of the spiritual Beloved! Every lover yearneth for the head of his Beloved, and every enkindled soul hath disheveled tresses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیدائی روی دلبر معنوی هر عاشقی سر معشوقی دارد و هر دلداده ای پریشان موی
subcodes.subjects: @pain of love; love as veil, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God as sun
